roleTaxonomy.meaning: A generic individual person explicitly addressed by a side-story objective or level interactable.
roleTaxonomy.liveContract: side-story talk plus targetKind person, or level interactable fieldCharacter.kind npc plus role speaker
roleTaxonomy.silhouette: layered civilian coat, open hand, no insignia or carried prop

roleTaxonomy.meaning: A generic authored speaker explicitly present for an interview.
roleTaxonomy.silhouette: short rain mantle, folded sleeves, empty visible hands

roleTaxonomy.meaning: A generic person explicitly present behind one of the two authored prisoner grates.
roleTaxonomy.liveContract: level interactable fieldCharacter.kind equals npc and role equals confined-person
roleTaxonomy.silhouette: compact layered coat, close stance, empty lowered hands, no chain or cage prop

roleTaxonomy.meaning: A generic civilian courier explicitly authored as the archive-roof escort objective.
roleTaxonomy.liveContract: level interactable fieldCharacter.kind equals npc and role equals courier
roleTaxonomy.silhouette: forward civilian coat, compact secular satchel, empty hands, no weapon or insignia

roleTaxonomy.meaning: A Hoshigawa dock worker who owns practical knowledge of manifests and loading routes.
roleTaxonomy.silhouette: rolled work sleeves, short rain wrap, secular rope coil

roleTaxonomy.meaning: A Hoshigawa ferry captain whose route judgment remains locally authoritative.
roleTaxonomy.silhouette: broad rain coat, head cloth, empty signaling hand

roleTaxonomy.meaning: A Hoshigawa market seller who supplies local route testimony.
roleTaxonomy.silhouette: layered apron, compact secular produce basket

roleTaxonomy.meaning: A Sodegaura trade broker who explains port etiquette without controlling community choices.
roleTaxonomy.silhouette: clean layered coat, secular account satchel

roleTaxonomy.meaning: A Japanese print organizer who decides what testimony may travel.
roleTaxonomy.liveContract: explicit level fieldCharacter role print-organizer or side-story presentationRole print-organizer
roleTaxonomy.silhouette: ink-dark sleeves, blank secular paper bundle, no devotional print

roleTaxonomy.meaning: A Sodegaura port clerk who provides a bounded witness account.
roleTaxonomy.silhouette: narrow work coat, closed secular ledger at side

roleTaxonomy.meaning: A village physician whose practical aid precedes any request for risk.
roleTaxonomy.silhouette: short cloak, secular medicine basket, single herb stem

roleTaxonomy.meaning: A coal-town resident who names the civilian cost of the requisition system.
roleTaxonomy.silhouette: ash-worn layers, empty open hand, no occupational stereotype

roleTaxonomy.meaning: A former retainer choosing civilian stand-down under locally stated terms.
roleTaxonomy.silhouette: broad repaired civilian mantle, work bag, no weapon or crest

roleTaxonomy.meaning: A clandestine community caretaker who sets handling rules for private letters.
roleTaxonomy.silhouette: plain hooded rain wrap, secular cloth bundle, empty hand

roleTaxonomy.meaning: A fishing-village net mender who owns the meaning of local rope marks.
roleTaxonomy.silhouette: working wrap, small secular net coil, braced seated-work stance

roleTaxonomy.meaning: A post keeper who confirms which civilian fog signal must remain in service.
roleTaxonomy.silhouette: weather cape, secular travel pouch, empty signaling hand

likenessPolicy: generic fictional people only; no real-person likenesses
symbolPolicy: plain invented clothing geometry only; no real insignia or sacred marks
